sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57589" key="kissoto/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κισσο-τόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τέμνω</etym>) <sense id="n57589.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivy-cutting</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κισσοτόμοι</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμέραι</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, festival at Phlius, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:13:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
